name: Ken Cheng doesn't believe in giving his employees raises to boost
snippet: He has a simpler solution: Take away their desk chairs. Without the ability to sit, workers are more alert and inspired, he wrote on LinkedIn. Missing: text | Show results with: text

name: #nomorechair | Ken Cheng | 107 comments - LinkedIn
snippet: You could donate the chairs to “chairity” and get a tax write off for your company. It saves tax dollars too. Like.

name: Ken Cheng's Post - LinkedIn
snippet: I refuse to help set up chairs. We were setting up for a conference meeting yesterday and I let my assistant do all the chairs herself. Why? Missing: desk | Show results with: desk
